meaning: n.香料,调味品,趣味,意味,情趣
examples: The spice imparts an Eastern flavour to the dish.
The Spice Islands were within the Spanish domains.
My team is working on a spice vending machine for spices.
There were lessons in business to be found by the Spice Girls reuniting that evening.
Maybe a wine with a little spice to it and a cut of crispness?
